title: The Pittsburgh Businesses Actually Showing Up On Their Own Feed
subtitle: The minority that are posting, ranked by Instagram momentum
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index are dormant on Instagram. These are the ones that aren't, ranked by 30-day cadence and engagement.
intro:
Of the hundreds of Pittsburgh small businesses tracked in this index, most have Instagram accounts that stopped moving months ago. This list is the exception: ten businesses still posting, still pulling engagement, ranked by 30-day cadence and the momentum visible in their numbers right now.

A few stand out for reasons worth examining before you get to the rankings. Kyo Matcha in Squirrel Hill has accumulated 1.79 million TikTok plays while sitting fourth in its own category, which says something specific about the gap between viral attention and the review volume that actually moves a rank. Page's in Arlington is first in Pittsburgh Sweets on the strength of 3,145 reviews and thirteen creators filming there, none of which Page's posted itself. That kind of externally built presence is its own signal. Delanie's Coffee lands at the other end of the logic: it has an account, it's posting, and its own content is the thing holding it back.

What this quarter doesn't fully answer is whether any of these businesses will own the conversation they're currently borrowing. Issue 02, out Summer 2026, will track whether the gap between creator-built momentum and operator-owned presence is closing, or compounding.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Fourth In Pittsburgh Sweets, Carried By 1.79 Million TikTok Plays. The Reviews Have Not Caught Up.

featured_tiktok.author: andremelendez
featured_tiktok.caption: this matcha place deserves more hype👀 #matchalover #fluffiestmatcha #matchaspot

items.playbook_top_move: Close the review sentiment gap directly. Review sentiment sits 16 points below the family median; a structured response to the two negative reviews on record, plus a visible correction on portion consistency and closing-time policy, signals to future reviewers that the business is paying attention.

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Cafes, Riding 278K TikTok Plays It Doesn't Own Yet.
items.playbook_top_move: Add a website to Google Business. Conversion path sits well below the family median of 100; a linked website is the fastest single fix available right now.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Third In Pittsburgh Bars On Beer Alone. The Food Ceiling And Missing TikTok Presence Keep The Rank There.
items.playbook_top_move: Fix the food execution gap now. Two of eight sampled reviews cite specific overcooked dishes; resolving those complaints directly raises sentiment off its below-median floor.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By Creator Volume And A History The City Keeps Rediscovering.

featured_tiktok.author: pittsburghpg
featured_tiktok.caption:
HBO Max's award-winning medical drama “The Pitt” does a lot of things to ground itself in Pittsburgh.
Its emergency room is based on that of Allegheny General Hospital on the North Side. There are a variety of local references, including on

items.playbook_top_move: Convert creator plays into owned engagement. With 607K TikTok plays across 31 creators this quarter, repost or stitch the top-performing creator videos directly to @alleghenycoffee Reels to redirect that external reach back toward a 1.23% engagement rate that hasn't caught up to posting volume.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars, Carried By Creators On A Platform It Has Never Joined.
items.playbook_top_move: Turn existing TikTok plays into owned presence. Ten creators posted 425,844 plays this quarter; claim a TikTok account and repost the top-performing videos before that momentum belongs entirely to someone else.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Sweets, Carried By 3,145 Reviews And Thirteen Creators Filming On TikTok Where Page's Has No Account.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok presence creators built. Open a Page's TikTok account and repost the top-performing creator videos, starting with the 62,800-play clip from @bhphotographypa, to anchor an audience that already exists.

items.name: Tazza D'Oro
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes On Review Depth, Trailing Allegheny On Every Social Signal.

featured_tiktok.author: latashaforpa
featured_tiktok.caption:
I might even buy you a coffee… ☕️ 

Stop by Tazza D’oro to pick-up, drop-off or sign my petition to get on the ballot in the May 19 Primary Election!

Team #Mayes2026 will be there 9A-3P Saturdays and Sundays starting today, February 21!

#

items.playbook_top_move: Start posting Reels, not just stills. Tazza posted 11 times in 30 days but zero Reels; even two short videos per week would directly address the engagement rate sitting at 0.79 percent.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: Third In Sweets, Carried By 35 Creators On A Platform Where Jeni's Has No Account.

featured_tiktok.author: morganchompz
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying Jeni’s spring ice cream flavor lineup! 🍦💐 Have you tried any of these? @Jeni’s Splendid Ice Creams #icecream #dessert #newfood #foodreview #snacks

items.playbook_top_move: Claim a TikTok presence in Pittsburgh. 35 creators have posted 37 videos totaling 1.15 million plays this quarter; a brand account captures that tag traffic rather than losing it entirely.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Bars, With 170K TikTok Plays The Brewery Itself Didn't Post.

featured_tiktok.author: stevenjamesyuhasz
featured_tiktok.caption: The staff and customer service here was unbelievable. Definitely the type of place I want to support. @B&K Farm Market #warren #youngstown #cortland #ohio

items.playbook_top_move: Turn creator footage into owned reach. Launch a Hop Farm TikTok account and repost top creator clips; 21 creators and 170,828 plays exist with no account to capture any of it.

items.name: Delanie's Coffee Shadyside
items.descriptor: Seventh In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By Other People's TikToks And Held Back By Its Own.

featured_tiktok.author: stephr0se8
featured_tiktok.caption:
Some of my fave local coffee shops! Drop some more reccs for me to try 👇🏼
#localcoffeeshop #pittsburgh #coffeetok #supportsmallbusiness #fyp

items.playbook_top_move: Build a TikTok presence from existing footage. Sixteen creators have already filmed 17 videos here; claim the business page and repost the best-performing ones to start building a native presence.
